name: keeptradecut value year week split
expected_query:
with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2024), "player_participation_weeks" as (SELECT pid, year, week, bool_or(active) AS active
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2024::int AS year, g.week, pgl.active
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2024 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE g.seas_type = 'REG' AND g.year = 2024) src
          GROUP BY pid, year, week), "player_years_teams" as (SELECT pid, year, array_agg(DISTINCT team_code) AS teams
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2024::int AS year, pgl.nfl_team AS team_code
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2024 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE pgl.active = TRUE AND g.seas_type = 'REG' AND g.year = 2024) src
          GROUP BY pid, year), "team_weeks_played" as (select distinct "team", "year", "week" from ((select "h" as "team", "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024)) union all (select "v" as "team", "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024))) as "g") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position" AS "primary_position_0", "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96"."v" AS "player_keeptradecut_value_0", "player_years_weeks"."year", "player_years_weeks"."week", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = player_years_weeks.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = player_years_weeks.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END AS participation_status, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_weeks"."year" = "player_years"."year" left join "opening_days" on "opening_days"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" left join "keeptradecut_rankings" as "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96" on "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96"."qb" = 2 and "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96"."type" = 1 and "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96"."d" = EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (date_trunc('day', opening_days.opening_day) + interval '0 year'))::integer and opening_days.year = (player_years_weeks.year) left join "player_participation_weeks" on "player_participation_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_participation_weeks"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" and "player_participation_weeks"."week" = "player_years_weeks"."week" left join "player_years_teams" on "player_years_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_teams"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."primary_position", "t6969e51994e27c5e6da014be05b68c96"."v", "player_years_weeks"."year", "player_years_weeks"."week", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = player_years_weeks.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = player_years_weeks.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 10
